name: SensorPush

customtypedparams.name: sample_limit
customtypedparams.title: Sample Limit
customtypedparams.desc: How many samples to request per sensor (default 1).

customtypedparams.name: sensor_stale_hours
customtypedparams.title: Sensor Stale Hours
customtypedparams.desc: Alert when no fresh sample is seen for this many hours (default 1).

customtypedparams.name: sensor_stale_notify_recovery
customtypedparams.title: Notify On Recovery
customtypedparams.desc: Send ntfy when a stale sensor starts reporting again (default 1).

customtypedparams.name: ntfy_topic
customtypedparams.title: ntfy Topic
customtypedparams.desc: Optional: set to enable push notifications via ntfy.

customtypedparams.name: ntfy_token
customtypedparams.title: ntfy Access Token
customtypedparams.desc: Optional bearer token for private ntfy topics.

description: PG3 for SensorPush cloud API with configurable short/long poll update mode.
